claim: Citation tracking binds claims to inspectable evidence.

evidence.title: Citation tracking
evidence.text: Citation tracking binds claims to inspectable evidence and source chunks.
evidence.quote: Citation tracking binds claims to inspectable evidence.

learning_note: A direct citation covers the important terms, so the atomic claim should be supported.

claim: Vector retrieval improves semantic recall coverage ranking citation reuse.

evidence.title: Vector retrieval
evidence.text: Vector retrieval stores embeddings and retrieves related evidence by similarity.

learning_note: The citation overlaps with vector retrieval, but several important terms are missing, so support is partial.

evidence.title: Citation tracking
evidence.text: Citation tracking records evidence ids, source chunks, and quote spans for later audit.

learning_note: The citation exists, but it does not support the vector recall claim.

evidence.title: Verifier limits
evidence.text: Verifier heuristics can reduce hallucinations but do not guarantee perfect truth.
evidence.quote: Verifier heuristics can reduce hallucinations but do not guarantee perfect truth.

learning_note: The claim uses an absolute guarantee while the evidence says the method can reduce errors but does not guarantee truth.

claim: Citation tracking binds claims to evidence and vector search guarantees perfect recall.

evidence.title: Citation tracking
evidence.text: Citation tracking binds claims to evidence and source chunks for audit.
evidence.quote: Citation tracking binds claims to evidence.

learning_note: One atomic claim is supported, while the second atomic claim has no supporting evidence, so the aggregate status is partial.

evidence.title: Agent failure modes
evidence.text: Agent reports can contain unsupported claims and should be verified.
evidence.quote: Agent reports can contain unsupported claims.

learning_note: No citation ids are attached, so the verifier cannot ground the claim even if evidence exists nearby.
